title: Paul Morphy's Famous Opera Game
games_in_order: 01 Duke of Brunswick / Count Isouard vs Paul Morphy, Paris Opera 1858
notes: Agadmator's signature calm storytelling: he sets the scene (the Paris opera, the Duke), then narrates the attack building to the queen sacrifice and back-rank mate.
